CVE-2020-13956.99e5a1072466b50a8ef2f7f9a674c919d9f106ab:
CVE-2020-13956:Update httpclient.version to 4.5.13

As per https://bugzilla.redhat.com/show_bug.cgi?id=1886587, http.client librarires below version 4.5.13 have the vulnerability CVE-2020-13956. As Karaf rebundles http.client classes as seen at https://github.com/apache/karaf/blob/karaf-4.2.10/jaas/modules/pom.xml#L180 This makes it vulnerable and hence our security scans are detecting it as a vulnerable library. And hence updating the httpclient.version to 4.5.13.

(cherry picked from commit 2eeda0020a945d7aa224bee0b69109fc4c5c0865)
